meaning: n.蜂蜜酒(蜂蜜和水的混合物,经发酵后成为蜂蜜酒)
examples: It was fed with Frankliniella occidentalis and hydromel to study effects of hydromel on its development.
The natural enemy of Orius similis was fed with Frankliniella occidentalis and hydromel to study effects of hydromel on its development, survival rate, longevity and fecundity.
